project.name: antrian
project.description: Queue management system for service counters with real-time WebSocket updates

nodes.name: QueueCalled.php
nodes.summary: Broadcast event fired when a queue ticket is called at a counter for service.

nodes.name: QueueCompleted.php
nodes.summary: Broadcast event fired when a queue ticket service is completed.

nodes.name: QueueCreated.php
nodes.summary: Broadcast event fired when a new queue ticket is generated at kiosk.

nodes.name: QueueSkipped.php
nodes.summary: Broadcast event fired when a queue ticket is skipped by counter staff.

nodes.name: VolumeUpdate.php
nodes.summary: Broadcast event fired when display volume is adjusted remotely.

nodes.name: QueuesController.php
nodes.summary: API controller handling queue ticket lifecycle: create, call, recall, complete, skip, and statistics.

nodes.name: Queue.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for queue tickets with relationships to counters, users, and logs. Provides state transition methods.

nodes.name: api.php
nodes.summary: API route definitions for all endpoints including queues, auth, counters, displays, and audit logs.

nodes.name: channels.php
nodes.summary: WebSocket channel authorization rules for real-time broadcasting.

nodes.name: QueueCalled
nodes.summary: Laravel broadcast event class announcing when a ticket is called.

nodes.name: QueueCompleted
nodes.summary: Laravel broadcast event class announcing when a ticket is completed.

nodes.name: QueueCreated
nodes.summary: Laravel broadcast event class announcing when a new ticket is created.

nodes.name: QueueSkipped
nodes.summary: Laravel broadcast event class announcing when a ticket is skipped.

nodes.name: VolumeUpdate
nodes.summary: Laravel broadcast event class announcing display volume changes.

nodes.name: QueuesController
nodes.summary: API controller with 11 methods managing queue ticket operations and statistics.

nodes.name: Queue
nodes.summary: Eloquent model with state checks, relationships, and transition methods for queue tickets.

nodes.name: index
nodes.summary: GET endpoint listing queues with filters by status, date range, and counter ID. Returns paginated response.

nodes.name: store
nodes.summary: POST endpoint creating new queue ticket with auto-generated number. Broadcasts QueueCreated event.

nodes.name: call
nodes.summary: POST endpoint calling a ticket to service. Validates loket role and counter assignment. Broadcasts QueueCalled event.

nodes.name: complete
nodes.summary: POST endpoint marking ticket as completed with service duration tracking. Broadcasts QueueCompleted event.

nodes.name: skip
nodes.summary: POST endpoint skipping a ticket. Logs audit trail and broadcasts QueueSkipped event.

nodes.name: callNext
nodes.summary: POST endpoint finding and calling the next waiting ticket for a counter. Prioritizes counter-specific tickets.

nodes.name: stats
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning today's queue statistics including counts by status and average wait time.

nodes.name: call
nodes.summary: State transition method updating queue to called status with timestamp and user tracking.

nodes.name: complete
nodes.summary: State transition method updating queue to completed status with completion timestamp.

nodes.name: skip
nodes.summary: State transition method updating queue to skipped status with timestamp.

nodes.name: User.php
nodes.summary: Laravel Eloquent User model with role-based access control helpers and relationships to Counter, Queue, and AuditLog.
nodes.languageNotes: Laravel Eloquent model with HasFactory trait and Sanctum HasApiTokens for SPA authentication.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: Core user model with role-checking methods (isAdmin, isLoket, isSuper, hasRole) and relationships to counters, queues, and audit logs.

nodes.name: Counter.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model representing a service counter with users and queue relationships.

nodes.name: Counter
nodes.summary: Service counter model with many-to-many User relationship and has-many Queue relationship.

nodes.name: Display.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for TV display screens with video content relationships.

nodes.name: Display
nodes.summary: Display screen model with has-many Video relationship and scope for active videos.

nodes.name: KioskStation.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for kiosk stations with printer profile relationship and heartbeat tracking.

nodes.name: KioskStation
nodes.summary: Kiosk station model with printer profile, online/offline status, and heartbeat update method.

nodes.name: PrinterProfile.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for thermal printer configurations supporting 58mm and 80mm widths.

nodes.name: PrinterProfile
nodes.summary: Printer profile with width detection methods (is58mm, is80mm, getWidth) and has-many KioskStations.

nodes.name: QueueLog.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for queue activity logging with timestamps.

nodes.name: QueueLog
nodes.summary: Minimal queue log model with belongs-to Queue relationship.

nodes.name: Video.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for video content associated with display screens.

nodes.name: Video
nodes.summary: Video model with belongs-to Display relationship and active status scope.

nodes.name: AuditLog.php
nodes.summary: Eloquent model for application audit logging with static create method.

nodes.name: AuditLog
nodes.summary: Audit log model with static log() method for recording user actions, model changes, and IP addresses.

nodes.name: CountersController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for service counter management with CRUD operations and user assignment capabilities.

nodes.name: DisplaysController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for TV display management with volume broadcast events and sync operations.

nodes.name: UsersController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for user account management with full CRUD operations for admin users.

nodes.name: KioskStationsController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for kiosk station management with token regeneration and heartbeat monitoring.

nodes.name: PrinterProfilesController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for printer profile configuration with CRUD operations for thermal printer settings.

nodes.name: AuthController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for authentication handling login, logout, user info, and token refresh endpoints.

nodes.name: AuditLogsController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for audit log retrieval with filtering, pagination, and export capabilities.

nodes.name: VideosController.php
nodes.summary: API controller for video file management with upload, CRUD operations, and playlist reordering.

nodes.name: syncUsers
nodes.summary: Bulk syncs multiple user assignments to a counter, replacing existing assignments.

nodes.name: updateVolume
nodes.summary: Updates display volume and broadcasts VolumeUpdate event to connected clients.

nodes.name: regenerateToken
nodes.summary: Regenerates API authentication token for a kiosk station.

nodes.name: heartbeat
nodes.summary: Updates kiosk station last seen timestamp for health monitoring.

nodes.name: login
nodes.summary: Authenticates user credentials and returns sanctum token with user data.

nodes.name: export
nodes.summary: Exports filtered audit logs as CSV file for offline analysis.

nodes.name: reorder
nodes.summary: Updates video display order based on provided sequence array.

nodes.name: CheckRole.php
nodes.summary: Laravel middleware that enforces role-based access control by checking if the authenticated user has one of the required roles (admin, super, or loket).
nodes.languageNotes: Laravel HTTP middleware using $request->user() and in_array() for role validation.

nodes.name: AssignCounter.php
nodes.summary: Laravel middleware that automatically assigns a counter to loket users based on their role. Admin and super users bypass counter assignment; loket users must have at least one assigned counter.
nodes.languageNotes: Middleware checks user role via $user->isAdmin(), $user->isSuper(), $user->isLoket() and accesses assignedCounters() relationship.

nodes.name: Authenticate.php
nodes.summary: Laravel authentication middleware that determines where to redirect unauthenticated users. Returns JSON for API requests or redirects to login for web requests.

nodes.name: StoreQueueRequest.php
nodes.summary: Laravel Form Request that validates incoming queue creation requests with rules for counter_id, priority, and service_type fields with Indonesian error messages.

nodes.name: app.php
nodes.summary: Laravel bootstrap file that configures middleware aliases for AssignCounter and CheckRole middleware, making them available in route definitions.

nodes.name: providers.php
nodes.summary: Laravel providers configuration file that registers application service providers including AppServiceProvider.

nodes.name: Controller.php
nodes.summary: Base Laravel controller class that all other API controllers extend, providing common functionality and inheritance structure.

nodes.name: broadcasting.php
nodes.summary: Laravel broadcasting configuration file that defines the broadcasting driver and connection settings for real-time WebSocket events via Laravel Reverb.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Laravel broadcasting with Reverb driver for real-time event broadcasting.

nodes.name: auth.php
nodes.summary: Laravel authentication configuration defining guards (API with Sanctum) and providers for User model with database user provider.
nodes.languageNotes: Configures Sanctum API guard with session/web guards for traditional auth.

nodes.name: CheckRole
nodes.summary: Middleware class that validates user roles against allowed roles array, returning 403 Forbidden if user lacks required role.

nodes.name: handle
nodes.summary: Handles the request by checking if authenticated user has one of the allowed roles from the role parameter.

nodes.name: AssignCounter
nodes.summary: Middleware class that auto-assigns counter sessions to loket users by checking role and assignedCounters relationship.

nodes.name: handle
nodes.summary: Handles request by checking user role - admin/super bypass, loket users must have assigned counters.

nodes.name: StoreQueueRequest
nodes.summary: Form request class for validating queue creation data with rules for counter_id, priority, and service_type fields.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Antrian queue management system with Laravel backend and Next.js frontend
